blockers: The automation runtime can launch system Chromium but outbound navigation to the verified workers.dev baseline is denied by the environment with net::ERR_BLOCKED_BY_ADMINISTRATOR
Playwright-managed Chromium download is also unavailable because the runtime cannot resolve the Playwright CDN hosts
Desktop, mobile, console, full-scroll, reduced-motion, dependency-loading and WebGL recovery evidence therefore cannot be collected in this runtime
Product source editing remains prohibited until browser evidence is collected against the exact deployed main SHA
